title: Input
description: Text input with label, helper, error messages, icons, prefix/suffix and three visual variants.

basic.title: Basic usage
basic.desc: Input with label, placeholder and v-model.
basic.label: Email

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: Three sizes for different UI densities.

props.label: Visible label above the input.
props.helperText: Helper text below the input. Hidden when errorText is present.
props.errorText: Error message that marks the input as invalid.
props.color: Semantic color applied to the focus state.
props.radius: Corner radius. Inherits from ModoProvider when omitted.
props.halo: Persistent halo (ring) style. Inherits from ModoProvider.
props.fullWidth: Applies w-full to the field root.
props.readonly: Read-only: keeps normal style but prevents editing.
props.required: Marks the field as required and shows the indicator.
props.loading: Shows a loader and locks the input during async operations.
props.clearable: Shows an ✕ button to clear the value when there is content.
props.maxLength: Maximum value length. Activates the counter if showCounter.
props.iconLeft: Icon rendered inside the input on the left.
props.iconRight: Icon rendered inside the input on the right.
props.name: HTML name attribute for form submission.
props.ariaLabel: Accessible name when there is no visible label.

emits.updateModelValue: Emitted on every value change (syncs v-model).
emits.focus: Emitted when the input receives focus.
emits.blur: Emitted when the input loses focus.
emits.clear: Emitted when the clear button is clicked (clearable).
